title: Special Golems
body:
About Special Golems

Special Golems is a mod focused on adding vanilla style golems to protect the player from hostile enemies.

 

Features

Special Golems features 4 golems. The Clay Golem, Terracotta Golem, Gold Golem, and the Diamond Golem.

 

Terracotta/Clay Golem

Stats (Normal Difficulty)

  • 1.95 blocks high (hitbox height)
  • 20 health points
  • The Terracotta Golem has 2 armor points
  • 2 armor toughness
  • The Terracotta Golem has an attack strength of 2
  • The Clay Golem has an attack strength of 1
  • 20% knockback resistance
  • 0.35 speed
  • Average sight

 

Specialty

  • The Terracotta/Clay Golem can pick up items, wearing armor, and welding weapons
  • Will drop items when the owner shift+right-clicks them
  • A burning Clay Golem will turn into a Terracotta Golem
  • The Terracotta Golem is immune to fire
  • Repairable with bricks/clay from the owner right-clicking on them

 

How to Summon

  • 2 Terracotta/Clay blocks
  • 1 Pumpkin
  • Place the 2 Terracotta/Clay blocks on top of each other (1x2x1), then place the Pumpkin on top

 

Gold Golem

Stats (Normal Difficulty)

  • 2 blocks high (hitbox height)
  • 200 health points
  • 12 armor points
  • 6 armor toughness
  • 100% knockback resistance
  • 0.135 speed
  • Very far sight

 

Specialty

  • The Gold Golem charges up its attacks to either shoot a powerful piercing laser dealing 15 (Normal Difficulty) magic damage or slam the ground dealing 10-6 (Normal Difficulty) generic damage
  • Lasers deal +5 more damage to undead mobs
  • Repairable with gold ingots from the owner right-clicking on them
  • Gold is heavy

 

How to Summon

  • 8 Gold blocks
  • 1 Pumpkin
  • Place all 8 Gold blocks in a 2x2x2 cube pattern, then place the Pumpkin anywhere on top

 

Diamond Golem

Stats (Normal Difficulty)

  • 4.95 blocks high (hitbox height)
  • 400 health points
  • 20 armor points
  • 12 armor toughness
  • 20 attack strength
  • 100% knockback resistance
  • 0.2 speed
  • Short sight

 

Specialty

    • Will sit down into a throne when the owner shift+right-clicks them
    • Sitting Throne: +10 armor points, +8 armor toughness, cannot move, cannot attack, grants "Unbreakable" to all allies nearby
    • Owners can sit on the sitting Diamond Golem (Throne) when they right-click
    • Unbreakable: Redirects a percentage of all damage taken to the nearest ally Diamond Golem (Throne), also building up pressure to that Diamond Golem (Throne) which increases the next redirected damage they take
    • Unbreakable applied to owner: 100%
    • Unbreakable applied to other allies: 50%
    • Will stand up when the owner shift+right-clicks them
    • Repairable with diamonds from the owner right-clicking on them

 

How to Summon

  • 24 Diamond blocks
  • 1 Pumpkin
  • Place all 24 Diamond blocks in a 2x4x3 rectangle pattern, then place the Pumpkin anywhere in the middle on top

 

Emerald Golem (In progress)

In progress.

 

 

This Mod was made with MCreator
